case_title: COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. VS. GUO HUI et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC.

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT HUI, GUO AKA GUO Q.HUI AKA HUI G.QING AKA HNI DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT HUI, GUO AKA GUO Q.HUI AKA HUI G.QING AKA HNI $5,027.05 PRINCIPAL, $1,067.66 INTEREST, $189.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,284.31, SEE SCANNED DOC
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC.

LAW AND MOTION, 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE AS FOLLOWS -- PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD -- GRANTED AS TO CONFIRMATION OF AWARD, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE COURT. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED, SUBMITTED ON OCT-25-2005 BY JAMES L. WARREN. JUDGE: JAMES L. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-03-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John J. Pugh, Esq. 916/830-0556 for Petitioner
Mr. Pugh appeared for a clarification of the Court's tentative ruling. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative as follows -- PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award -- granted as to confirmation of award, no opposition filed. The request for attorneys was argued and taken under submission by the Court. Proposed order submitted. (301/JLW/ju) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
